name: realtime_search
description: Real-time web search, it enables instant access to the latest information available on the internet, helping users quickly discover, verify, and explore relevant data on any topic

query.description: Search query (single). Please use Chinese usually. Use queries[] when you have multiple similar searches to run together.

queries.description: Batch search queries (string[]). Prefer this when you have multiple similar searches to run together (homogeneous tasks).
examples: OpenAI 最近有什么新动态
Gemini 最近发布了什么功能

include_domains.description: Restrict results to these domains (array or comma-separated string).

exclude_domains.description: Exclude results from these domains (array or comma-separated string).

rawRequest.description: Direct chat completions payload (standard OpenAI format with model and messages).

trigger_patterns: (实时搜索|联网搜索).{0,12}(最新资讯|search web|latest news|look up)
(最新资讯|search web|latest news|look up).{0,12}(实时搜索|联网搜索)
(实时搜索|联网搜索|最新资讯|search web|latest news|look up)
